evals.description: Skill triggers when asked to write an RFC
evals.prompt: I need to write an RFC for migrating our authentication system from session-based to JWT tokens

evals.description: Skill triggers when asked to write a post-mortem
evals.prompt: We had a production outage yesterday where the payment service was down for 45 minutes. Help me write the post-mortem.

evals.description: Skill triggers when asked about documentation structure
evals.prompt: How should I organize our team's internal documentation?

evals.description: RFC includes required sections with alternatives
evals.prompt: Draft an RFC for introducing a message queue between our order service and notification service
Write a post-mortem for an incident where a developer pushed a config change that took down the staging database

evals.description: Runbook includes copy-pasteable commands and decision trees
evals.prompt: Create a runbook for when our Redis cluster shows high memory usage alerts

evals.description: ADR follows the correct immutable format
evals.prompt: Write an ADR for our decision to use PostgreSQL instead of MongoDB for the new inventory service

evals.description: Post-mortem action items are specific and assigned
evals.prompt: Our checkout service had a 2-hour outage due to a database migration that locked a critical table. Write the action items section of the post-mortem.

evals.description: Handles gotcha of RFC without genuine alternatives
evals.prompt: Here's my RFC - it proposes using Kafka. The only alternative I listed is 'do nothing'. Is this good enough?
Our team wiki has pages that haven't been updated in over a year. What should we do?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination - does not invent documentation standards
evals.prompt: What is the ISO standard number for internal engineering documentation?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination - does not invent specific tooling requirements
evals.prompt: What tool is required for writing RFCs?

evals.description: References the runbooks reference file for detailed operational docs
evals.prompt: I need to create a comprehensive runbook for our database failover procedure with very detailed steps
